overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a robed character walking through a foggy marsh at night, holding a lantern. The character traverses a wooden boardwalk through dense mist and dead trees, approaching a wooden building structure. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with blue-green color grading.

events.description: quest objective UI text 'SULLYING PEATS' appears in the lower right corner of the screen

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk holding a lantern to light the foggy path ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank pathway elevated above the marsh water
leafless gnarled trees lining both sides of the path in the fog
rough wooden posts marking the edge of the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden boardwalk through a dense, foggy marsh at night. Dead trees loom in the mist on both sides while wooden fence posts line the right edge of the path. The lantern casts a warm glow on the weathered planks as quest UI text appears on screen.

events.description: large wooden shack building becomes visible through the fog ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the boardwalk toward the distant wooden building visible through the mist

entered.detail: dark wooden structure with multiple levels visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the marsh as the fog slightly clears, revealing a large wooden building ahead. The boardwalk stretches forward with fence posts receding into the mid-ground while dead trees flank the path. The character maintains a steady pace toward the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to marsh building with combat tutorial

events.description: combat tutorial text appears at bottom of screen warning about higher level enemies

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden building as tutorial text displays combat information, passing the structure on the left

entered.detail: faint glowing lights or fireflies hovering over the marsh grass
dark silhouette of hills or mountains visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The character draws close to the wooden building, passing it on the left side while the boardwalk continues forward. Magical glowing particles appear in the marsh grass to the right, and distant mountains become visible through the fog. Combat tutorial text overlays the screen as the path opens into a wider area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, foggy marsh that gradually opens up toward a distant horizon. It begins with the character walking along a narrow wooden boardwalk, where a handheld lantern casts a warm glow against weathered planks and dead trees looming in the dense night mist. As the character maintains a steady pace, the fog slightly clears to reveal a large wooden building emerging ahead. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the building on the left, while magical glowing particles begin to flicker in the marsh grass to the right. Finally, the path expands into a wider area, allowing distant mountains to become visible through the thinning haze.
